udt_struct_v0.doc: Global settings stored once upon initialization.
udt_struct_v0.name: Config

fields.doc: HyCrows treasury address; the only authority capable of resolving disputes.
fields.name: admin_address

fields.doc: SAC (Stellar Asset Contract) address for XLM on the current network.
fields.name: token_address

function_v0.doc:
Lock `amount` stroops from the buyer into the contract.

The buyer must have authorized the contract to move their XLM
(via SAC approval mechanism or auth envelope).

# Arguments
* `transaction_id` \xe2\x80\x93 A unique u64 ID chosen by the application/marketplace.
* `buyer`          \xe2\x80\x93 The party depositing the funds.
* `seller`         \xe2\x80\x93 The party providing the order/service.
* `amount`         \xe2\x80\x93 Amount in stroops (must be > 0).

# Panics
* If the transaction_id is already used.
* If the amount is \xe2\x89\xa4 0.
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the contract settings for the first time.
Can only be called once, right after deployment.

# Arguments
* `admin_address` \xe2\x80\x93 HyCrows treasury / admin wallet.
* `token_address` \xe2\x80\x93 SAC contract ID for XLM on the target network.

# Panics
If called more than once.
function_v0.name: initialize

udt_struct_v0.doc: The complete on-chain state of a single escrow transaction.
udt_struct_v0.name: EscrowTransaction

fields.doc: Ledger timestamp when the seller called mark_as_shipped. Zero = not shipped.
fields.name: shipped_timestamp

fields.doc: Anti-griefing stake from the buyer. Zero unless status is Disputed.
fields.name: stake_amount

udt_union_v0.doc:
Lifecycle stages of an escrow transaction.

Valid transitions:
Pending  \xe2\x86\x92 Shipped   (seller calls mark_as_shipped)
Shipped  \xe2\x86\x92 Disputed  (buyer calls open_dispute_with_stake)
Shipped  \xe2\x86\x92 Resolved  (buyer confirms OR auto_release_funds is triggered)
Disputed \xe2\x86\x92 Resolved  (admin rules in favor of seller)
Disputed \xe2\x86\x92 Refunded  (admin rules in favor of buyer)
udt_union_v0.name: TransactionStatus

function_v0.doc: Retrieve full transaction data. Useful for frontends/indexers.
function_v0.name: get_transaction

function_v0.doc:
Mark that the seller has shipped the goods/service.
This starts the 24-hour countdown timer for auto_release_funds.

# Panics
* If the caller is not the seller.
* If the transaction status is not Pending.
function_v0.name: mark_as_shipped

function_v0.doc:
Admin Only: resolve an active escrow dispute.

`buyer_is_right = true`  \xe2\x86\x92 Refund (principal + stake) back to buyer.
`buyer_is_right = false` \xe2\x86\x92 Funds to seller; stake slashed to treasury.

# Panics
* If the caller is not the admin.
* If status is not Disputed.
function_v0.name: resolve_dispute

function_v0.doc:
Anyone (guardian bot / seller) can trigger this after 24 hours
if the buyer becomes unresponsive.

# Panics
* If status is not Shipped.
* If the 24-hour waiting period has not elapsed.
function_v0.name: auto_release_funds

function_v0.doc:
Buyer opens an official dispute by depositing a 2 XLM stake.
The stake is slashed to the treasury if the admin rules against the buyer.

# Panics
* If the caller is not the buyer.
* If status is not Shipped.
function_v0.name: open_dispute_with_stake

function_v0.doc:
Called by the buyer when satisfied with the received goods/service.
Instantly releases the escrow funds to the seller.

# Panics
* If the caller is not the buyer.
* If the transaction status is not Shipped.
function_v0.name: confirm_receipt_and_release
